overall.description: First-person perspective from the bridge of a vessel navigating through dark waters at night, featuring functional navigation displays including radar and chart plotters. The footage transitions from calm conditions to a stormy environment with visible lightning, indicating a maritime simulation game.

agents.ego_description: operating the vessel from the bridge, monitoring the radar and navigation displays while maintaining course through open water

entered.detail: digital navigation chart showing coastal topography and vessel position
circular radar screen with rotating sweep arm detecting surrounding targets
sonar depth finder displaying water column and bottom structure
forward deck of the vessel with safety railings and navigation lights
metal safety railing visible through the bridge windows

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a steady night transit from the enclosed bridge of a vessel. Three illuminated navigation displays dominate the view: a chart plotter on the left, a rotating radar in the center, and a depth sounder on the right. The vessel moves smoothly through dark waters, with the bow visible through the forward windows.

events.description: lightning flashes illuminate the horizon to starboard, revealing an approaching electrical storm

agents.ego_description: continuing to navigate the vessel as weather conditions deteriorate with visible lightning strikes

entered.detail: electrical storm on the starboard horizon with bright lightning illuminating the clouds

segments.scene_description: The vessel continues its transit as environmental conditions change dramatically. A lightning storm becomes visible on the starboard side, briefly illuminating the distant horizon. The navigation displays remain active, with the radar continuing its sweep as the vessel moves through increasingly rough seas toward the storm front.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a vessel's bridge as a calm night transit evolves into a dramatic encounter with a lightning storm. It begins with a steady forward movement through dark waters, where the view is dominated by the glow of a chart plotter, a rotating radar, and a depth sounder. As the vessel pushes forward, the environment shifts dramatically when flashes of lightning begin to illuminate the distant horizon on the starboard side. The scene then intensifies as the ship moves through increasingly rough seas, with the active navigation displays continuing their sweep while the vessel steers directly toward the storm front.
